parsed.recommendation_text: For a multi-device setup within the budget, Voltix's 65W charger is an excellent choice. It offers two USB-C ports and one USB-A port for simultaneous charging of various devices at a low price point. Despite its lower brand recognition, it includes a cable and supports PPS for fast-charging Android phones. While some users report coil whine issues, the overall value proposition makes it a strong contender.
parsed.selection_rationale: Balances multi-device needs with budget constraints.
